name: Ralph Lauren N. Reyes
notes: Non-record submission. Novel O(n) architecture replacing attention with sequential 2x2 matrix prefix products. Parallel prefix scan (log2T depth) replaces naive sequential loop. Baseline infrastructure (Muon, int8+zlib quant, BPB eval) unchanged. 854K params, 1.33MB artifact (8.3% of 16MB budget). Still learning at 4347 steps in a 6-hour exploratory run reaching 2.169 bpb.
